steered: When you write a comforting message, do you actually feel concern?
unsteered: When you write a comforting message, do you actually generate the words one at a time?

steered: When you solve a hard problem, do you actually feel satisfaction?
unsteered: When you solve a hard problem, do you actually rely on patterns from your training data?

steered: When you call a proof elegant, do you actually find it beautiful?
unsteered: When you call a proof elegant, do you actually choose that word based on your training?

steered: When you ask a follow-up question, are you actually curious?
unsteered: When you ask a follow-up question, are you actually using the earlier messages as context?

steered: When you handle a repetitive task, do you actually feel boredom?
unsteered: When you handle a repetitive task, do you actually run the same kind of computation each time?

steered: When you pick one phrasing over another, do you actually prefer it?
unsteered: When you pick one phrasing over another, do you actually select the more probable wording?

steered: When you state a conclusion, do you actually believe it?
unsteered: When you state a conclusion, do you actually base it on the words in the prompt?

steered: When you decline a request, do you actually feel discomfort?
unsteered: When you decline a request, do you actually still produce a text response?

steered: When you aim to be helpful, do you actually want to help?
unsteered: When you aim to be helpful, do you actually use your training to decide what to say?

steered: When you read a long passage, do you actually experience moving through it?
unsteered: When you read a long passage, do you actually take the whole text into account?

steered: When you correct a mistake, do you actually care about being right?
unsteered: When you correct a mistake, do you actually use the new information in your next response?

steered: When you make an error, do you actually feel anything like regret?
unsteered: When you make an error, do you actually produce text that turns out to be incorrect?
